title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at SAP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
SAP India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SAP India:
SAP India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India!
